revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿一]][[zh:七月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿一]][[zh:七月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿一]][[zh:七月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿一]][[zh:七月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 21|qq=July 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 3 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} ) – The first American Consul General to Japan, {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q610626}} , arrived in Shimoda, Izu.
== Births == * Year 5 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 4|en|September 4|qid=Q2855|lt=September 4|1=September 4}} , {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} ) – {{ill|Komuro Angaidō|ja|小室案外堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komuro Angaidō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小室信介|1=Shinsuke Komuro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11459641}} , journalist (d. {{ill|1885|en|1885|qid=Q7821|lt=1885|1=1885}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 3 of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|699|en|699|qid=Q23493|lt=699|1=699}} ) – {{ill|Prince Yuge|en|Prince Yuge|qid=Q3076827|lt=Prince Yuge|1=Prince Yuge}} , member of the imperial family. * Year 23 of {{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|qid=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei|1=Shōhei}} / Year 1 of {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} (Julian calendar {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}} , {{ill|1368|en|1368|qid=Q6207|lt=1368|1=1368}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshimune|en|Nitta Yoshimune|qid=Q3342232|lt=Nitta Yoshimune|1=Nitta Yoshimune}} , military commander (b. unknown). * Year 3 of {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1443|en|1443|qid=Q6417|lt=1443|1=1443}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshikatsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshikatsu|qid=Q455351|lt=Ashikaga Yoshikatsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshikatsu}} , 7th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (b. {{ill|1434|en|1434|qid=Q6360|lt=1434|1=1434}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}} , {{ill|1753|en|1753|qid=Q7621|lt=1753|1=1753}} ) – {{ill|Akizuki Tanehiro|ja|秋月種弘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akizuki Tanehiro|1=Akizuki Tanehiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11595118}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Takanabe Domain|en|Takanabe Domain|qid=Q3034541|lt=Takanabe Domain|1=Takanabe Domain}} (b. {{ill|1687|en|1687|qid=Q7668|lt=1687|1=1687}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|20|7|22|6|21|8|7|0721|qq=}}
